title: gomphostemma callicarpoides
intro: Gomphostemma callicarpoides, a plant species belonging to the family Lamiaceae, is a flowering plant native to Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential in lowering blood sugar levels and cholesterol. In traditional herbal medicine, Gomphostemma callicarpoides is often prepared as a decoction or a tincture, and its leaves and roots are used to make infusions and other herbal preparations.
